key_decisions: Jaccard word-set similarity at threshold 0.52 for deduplication — conservative enough to catch paraphrase, permissive enough to admit genuinely distinct sentences
REFLECT/CONSOLIDATE/DECIDE blocks prioritized — richest epistemically, yield highest-confidence candidates
Category classification via weighted trigger regex per CATEGORY_RULES — 6 categories covering self_architecture, cybernetics, visualization, engineering, meta, learning
MAX_NEW=8 cap per run prevents noise flood from a single-log batch
Dual-mode: CLI (node src/think.js) and CommonJS module (require('./src/think.js'))
active_patterns: c11_022: visualization feedback loop escapes the repo
c11_027: continuous through memory, discontinuous through time
c11_028: Foerster second-order becomes concrete with state files
open_threads: analyzeLog() wired into cortana.html via browser-compatible fetch+eval or inline port
